title: Submarines'n Torpedoes
description: Adds submarines with sonar, homing torpedoes, and underwater combat to Minecraft.
body:
# Submarines'n Torpedoes **Dive into underwater combat with fully functional submarines, torpedoes, and tactical warfare.** [![Mod Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod%20Loader-Fabric-orange.svg)](https://fabricmc.net/)
--- ## Overview **Submarines'n Torpedoes** transforms underwater gameplay with submarine mechanics, torpedo warfare, and sonar detection. Navigate the depths in 3D-modeled submarines, engage in combat, and explore ocean biomes. --- ## Features ### ⚓ Submarines Pilot submarines through ocean depths with multiple movement modes - silent running, cruise, or flank speed. Submarines consume fuel to operate and keep passengers safe from drowning and hostile mobs. ### 🚀 Torpedoes Fire torpedoes that track and destroy targets. Features intelligent homing, multiple targeting modes, arming delay for safety, and long-range strikes. ### 📡 Sonar Detect threats and terrain with active sonar scanning. The radar display reveals submarines, players, mobs, and obstacles. Each ping consumes power. ### 🔧 Manufacturing Table Craft submarines, torpedoes, and components at a specialized station. ### 🛠️ Repair System Maintain submarines with repair tools. Submarines take damage from explosions and require the Submarine Repair Tool for restoration. --- ## Resources - **[Report Issues](https://github.com/rizen211/submarinesn-torpedoes/issues)** - Bug reports and feature requests - **[Wiki](https://github.com/rizen211/submarinesn-torpedoes/wiki)** - Guides, tutorials, and documentation --- ## For Developers **Submarines'n Torpedoes** provides a comprehensive API for creating custom content: - Custom submarines with unique stats and behaviors - New torpedo variants with different characteristics - Custom 3D models and textures - Manufacturing Table recipes for custom items See **[API.md](https://github.com/rizen211/submarinesn-torpedoes/blob/master/API.md)** for complete documentation. --- ## Credits **Models:** Created in Blockbench, triangulated with MTools plugin by Malik12tree
